snippets.text:
# DocAtlas

**Local, offline-first context packs for coding agents — from your own repository docs.**

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Vanilla1999/DocAtlas?style=for-the-badge)]

## Naming and compatibility

The product name is **DocAtlas**.

The PyPI package and CLI command are:

```bash
pipx install doc-atlas
doc-atlas --help
```

Some internal Python modules, storage paths,

snippets.text:
# Contributing to DocAtlas

DocAtlas still uses the internal Python package name `docmancer` in parts of the codebase for compatibility. New user-facing docs should use `DocAtlas` and the `doc-atlas`
snippets.source: {'source_class': 'project_doc', 'doc_scope': 'project', 'module_id': None, 'module_name': None, 'module_path': None, 'module_type': None, 'path': 'CONTRIBUTING.md', 'url': None, 'title': 'Contributing to DocAtlas'}

## Project structure

```text
docmancer/
  agent.py              # DocmancerAgent; parser registry (_PARSERS); component wiring
  core/
    config.py           # DocmancerConfig (pydantic-settings)
